title: Fix Mobile Zoom
description: Fix a page that has user-scalable=no in the viewport meta.
hint: Remove user-scalable=no and maximum-scale from the meta tag.

title: Increase Touch Targets
description: Given a set of small buttons (30×30px), increase them to meet WCAG minimum.
hint: Add min-width and min-height of 44px to all interactive elements.
solution: button, a, input, select, textarea { min-width: 44px; min-height: 44px; padding: 0.75rem; }

title: Implement Fluid Typography
description: Convert a fixed-px typography system to use clamp() for responsive accessibility.
hint: Use clamp(min, preferred, max) with vw units for preferred value.
solution: h1 { font-size: clamp(1.75rem, 4vw, 3rem); } h2 { font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 3vw, 2.25rem); } body { font-size: clamp(1rem, 1.5vw, 1.25rem); }
starterCode: h1 { font-size: 36px; } h2 { font-size: 28px; } body { font-size: 16px; }

title: Build Accessible Responsive Nav
description: Create a responsive navigation that's accessible at all viewport sizes with keyboard support.
hint: Use a hamburger button with aria-expanded, ensure nav items are focusable, manage focus when menu opens/closes.
solution: button[aria-expanded] toggles nav visibility. @media (max-width: 768px) { .nav { display: none; } .nav.open { display: flex; } }. Focus first item on open, trap focus.

title: Accessible Form at All Viewports
description: Make a multi-column form layout that stacks accessibly on mobile without losing label-input association.
hint: Use CSS Grid with auto-fit and minmax. Ensure labels remain properly associated at all sizes.
solution: .form-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(min(280px, 100%), 1fr)); gap: 1rem; } Each form group: label + input, min-height 44px.
